subject: Accounting
title: Net Income: The Bottom Line
description: One-minute skill: Net Income: The Bottom Line.

hook.text: After all revenues, costs, taxes, and interest—one number remains. Net income.

buildup.text: Net income is the final profit. It's what flows into retained earnings on the balance sheet.

discovery.text: Investors divide it by shares outstanding to get earnings per share—Wall Street's favorite metric.

twist.text: Net income can be manipulated through timing tricks, one-time charges, and creative accounting.

climax.text: Smart analysts never rely on net income alone—they dig deeper into cash flow and quality.

punchline.text: The bottom line matters. But check what's under it.

quiz.question: What does net income represent?
options: Final profit after all expenses and taxes
